rules.name: Login Type Selection
rules.condition: when user accesses login page without active session
rules.action: system must display login type options (e.g., email, organization) for user to select

rules.name: SSO Redirect on Login Type Selected
rules.condition: when user selects a login type
rules.action: system must redirect to SSO provider with appropriate parameters

rules.name: Token Validation Before Session Creation
rules.condition: when SSO provider sends callback token
rules.action: system must validate token before creating user session

rules.name: User Provisioning on First Login
rules.condition: when user identity from token is not found in system
rules.action: system must provision new user or map to existing user using identity attributes from token

rules.name: Session Cleared on Logout
rules.action: system must clear user session and redirect to Login page
